title: Everyone received Monday's digest twice
body:
Our whole workspace got two copies of the daily digest on Monday. Normally it's exactly one copy per person per day.

Context that might matter: Monday was our product launch, so the digest had a lot more items than usual.

I poked around this repo and my money is on `dedupeRecipients` in `src/recipients.js` - we have several people subscribed through multiple projects, and that backwards loop with `unshift` looks like it could keep both rows under load. But honestly that doesn't quite explain why people with a single subscription also got two copies.

Details:

- Both copies had identical subject and content
- They arrived about 40 minutes apart
- Tuesday's digest was back to a single copy

Happy to share message headers if useful.
